
### example 2  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width=30%}
 
```c
void foo(unsigned a,
         unsigned b,
         unsigned c) {
  if (a != 0) {
    b -= c; // W
  }
  if (b < 5) {
    if (b > c) {
      a += b; // X
    }
    b += 4; // Y
  } else {
    a += 1; // Z
  }
  assert(a + b == 7);
}
```

:::

::: {.column width=69%}


::::: {.r-stack width=600px}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-1.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-2.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-3.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-4.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-5.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-6.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-7.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=7}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-8.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=8}

![](/symbolic/texfig/symbolic-exec-example2.figure-9.svg){ width=600px .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=9}

:::::

:::

::::
 [Adapted from Hicks, ‘‘Symbolic Execution for Finding Bugs’’]{.mycredit}
